review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < staged diff prompt > /tmp/cp00-105-claude-review-output-valid.json

findings.title: Six failure-category templates are unreachable and P07.M10 re-emits P07.M09 category labels
findings.evidence: CP105_FAILURE_CATEGORY_TEMPLATES defines 20 categories, but createCoreDomainCp105FailureCloseoutEntries only reaches templates[17..19] (RP01.P07.M08, start_index 18), templates[0..10] (RP01.P07.M09, start_index 1), and templates[0..2] (RP01.P07.M10, start_index 1). Templates[11..16] (retry_exhaustion, rollback_expectation, compensation_expectation, blocked_claim_receipt, failure_fixture, failure_unit_test) are never emitted, and RP01.P07.M10.S01-S03 reproduce failure_taxonomy/missing_tenant/missing_actor identical to RP01.P07.M09.S01-S03. Coverage validation still passes because CP105_FAILURE_CLOSEOUT_CATEGORY_IDS lists only the 14 categories that are actually produced. This is reference-only synthetic data, so no no-write/permission/audit/LDIP boundary is affected; the risk is dead template data plus possible mislabeling of the M10 closeout units against docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json.
findings.recommendation: Confirm that the three RP01.P07.M10 closeout units are intended to mirror M09's first three categories; if not, repoint the M10 start_index/template mapping to the intended categories and delete the six unreachable template entries. Non-blocking; does not gate production_ready.

findings.title: New test depends on Object.groupBy (Node 21+)
findings.evidence: The test 'CP00-105 review question catalog stays read-only and cannot approve pack state' calls Object.groupBy(reviewQuestions, (item) => item.review_area). Object.groupBy is only available on Node 21+; on older runtimes this throws ReferenceError before the read-only/no-approval assertions execute, weakening the gate it is meant to enforce.
findings.recommendation: Verify the project's minimum supported Node version is >= 21; otherwise replace Object.groupBy with a manual reduce/filter grouping so the review-question read-only assertions still run. Non-blocking pending toolchain confirmation.

parsed_review.rationale: CP00-105 is verified against the required scope. The new evidence-review-catalog covers exactly 150 unique synthetic units (17 P07 failure-closeout + 115 P08 Hermes receipt + 18 P09 review-question references), with the declared range RP01.P07.M08.S18-RP01.P09.M03.S09 anchored at both ends and a handoff to CP00-106 at RP01.P09.M03.S10. Every emitted item is forced synthetic_only=true / uses_real_client_data=false and asserts false for evaluates_runtime_permission, writes_audit_event, writes_product_state, creates_database_rows, executes_ai_retrieval, executes_export_download, executes_external_share, mutates_locks, retries_operations, performs_rollback, performs_compensation, executes_claude_review, grants_human_approval, and ldip_implemented; cp105FreezeItem applies these after the spread so they cannot be overridden. The contract block, JS constants, validator script (validate-rp01-core-domain-contract.mjs), and four new tests are mutually consistent on all counts (command_matrix 11, no_real_data 4, pass_semantics 3, permission/audit questions 3/3), forbidden-claim list (15 entries), policies, and the production_ready flag core_domain_evidence_review_catalog_verified; the Claude review packet is a reference declaration (read_only=true, exactly_one_valid_pack_review_required=true) and does not execute review, and BLOCK semantics carry block_must_not_be_reported_as_pass. Boundaries and gating are adequate; only two non-blocking P3 code-quality observations were found (unreachable failure-category templates with M10 label reuse, and an Object.groupBy/Node-version dependency in a test).
notes: No P0/P1/P2 findings were reported by the valid CP00-105 pack-level Claude review.
P3 Object.groupBy test dependency was fixed after review without running a second valid review.

P3 P07.M10 category mirroring was documented as plan-aligned because docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json labels RP01.P07.M10.S01-S03 as failure taxonomy, missing tenant failure, and missing actor failure.

p3_fixed_or_documented.title: New test depends on Object.groupBy (Node 21+)
p3_fixed_or_documented.evidence: Replaced Object.groupBy with a manual reduce grouping in packages/domain/test/core-domain-foundation.test.js and reran domain tests plus rp01:core-domain:validate.

p3_fixed_or_documented.title: Six failure-category templates are unreachable and P07.M10 re-emits P07.M09 category labels
p3_fixed_or_documented.evidence: Generated CP00-105 plan labels RP01.P07.M10.S01-S03 as Failure taxonomy, Missing tenant failure, and Missing actor failure; full taxonomy templates remain available for index-offset consistency but only plan-reachable category ids are required by the contract.
